dashboard.label: Network Connections
dashboard.description: Monitor outbound connections, DNS activity, and non-standard port usage across endpoints. | ATT&CK: T1071 (Application Layer Protocol), T1571 (Non-Standard Port), T1048 (Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol)

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode IN (3, 22) earliest=-24h | stats count by Computer | sort - count

index=sysmon EventCode=3 Initiated=true Computer=$host_filter$ | eval process_name=mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1) | search process_name=$process_filter$ | where NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", DestinationIp) | stats count as connection_count dc(DestinationIp) as unique_destinations dc(DestinationPort) as unique_ports values(DestinationPort) as dest_ports latest(DestinationIp) as last_dest_ip latest(_time) as last_seen by Computer, process_name, Image, User | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval risk=case( connection_count > 100 AND unique_destinations > 10, "HIGH", unique_ports > 5, "HIGH", match(Image, "(?i)(temp|appdata|public|downloads)"), "HIGH", connection_count > 50, "MEDIUM", 1=1, "LOW" ) | sort - connection_count | table Computer, process_name, User, connection_count, unique_destinations, unique_ports, dest_ports, last_dest_ip, last_seen, risk | rename Computer as "Host", process_name as "Process", User as "User", connection_count as "Connections", unique_destinations as "Unique Dest IPs", unique_ports as "Unique Ports", dest_ports as "Destination Ports", last_dest_ip as "Last Dest IP", last_seen as "Last Seen", risk as "Risk" | head 50

panel.title: DNS Query Volume Over Time (Sysmon Event 22)

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=22 Computer=$host_filter$ | timechart span=1h count as "DNS Queries" by Computer limit=10 useother=false

index=sysmon EventCode=22 Computer=$host_filter$ | rex field=QueryName "(?<top_domain>[^\.]+\.[^\.]+)$" | where isnotnull(top_domain) AND NOT match(top_domain, "(?i)(microsoft\.com|windowsupdate\.com|windows\.net|bing\.com|msftconnecttest\.com|office\.com|office365\.com|live\.com|azure\.com|digicert\.com|symantec\.com|verisign\.com|akamai\.net|cloudflare\.com|amazonaws\.com)") | stats count as query_count dc(QueryName) as unique_subdomains dc(Computer) as hosts_querying values(Computer) as querying_hosts latest(Image) as last_process by top_domain | eval subdomain_ratio=round(unique_subdomains/query_count, 4) | eval risk=case( unique_subdomains > 50 AND subdomain_ratio > 0.8, "HIGH - Possible DNS Tunneling", query_count > 500, "MEDIUM - High Volume", hosts_querying=1 AND query_count > 20, "MEDIUM - Single Host", 1=1, "LOW" ) | sort - query_count | table top_domain, query_count, unique_subdomains, subdomain_ratio, hosts_querying, querying_hosts, last_process, risk | rename top_domain as "Domain", query_count as "Queries", unique_subdomains as "Unique Subdomains", subdomain_ratio as "Subdomain Ratio", hosts_querying as "Hosts Querying", querying_hosts as "Host List", last_process as "Last Process", risk as "Risk Assessment" | head 50

format.colorPalette: {"HIGH - Possible DNS Tunneling":#DC4E41,"MEDIUM - High Volume":#F8BE34,"MEDIUM - Single Host":#F8BE34,"LOW":#65A637}

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=3 Initiated=true Computer=$host_filter$ | where NOT DestinationPort IN (80, 443, 53, 445, 135, 139, 389, 636, 88, 3389, 5985, 5986, 8080, 8443, 123, 25, 587, 993, 995, 110, 143) | where NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", DestinationIp) AND NOT cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", DestinationIp) | eval process_name=mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1) | eval conn_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | stats count as connections dc(DestinationIp) as unique_ips values(DestinationIp) as dest_ips latest(_time) as last_seen by Computer, process_name, DestinationPort, User | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval risk=case( DestinationPort IN (4444, 5555, 6666, 1234, 31337, 8888, 9999), "CRITICAL - Known C2 Port", DestinationPort > 49152, "MEDIUM - Ephemeral Range", connections > 50, "HIGH - High Frequency", 1=1, "LOW" ) | sort - connections | table Computer, process_name, User, DestinationPort, connections, unique_ips, dest_ips, last_seen, risk | rename Computer as "Host", process_name as "Process", User as "User", DestinationPort as "Dest Port", connections as "Connections", unique_ips as "Unique IPs", dest_ips as "Destination IPs", last_seen as "Last Seen", risk as "Risk" | head 50

format.colorPalette: {"CRITICAL - Known C2 Port":#DC4E41,"HIGH - High Frequency":#F1813F,"MEDIUM - Ephemeral Range":#F8BE34,"LOW":#65A637}
